note: Ajax Loader replaces Drupal's core AJAX throbber with a configurable animated spinner. Everything lives in the ajax_loader.settings config object (keys: throbber, throbber_position, hide_ajax_message, always_fullscreen, show_admin_paths) and a Throbber plugin type with 12 built-ins. Easy cases are response-graded recipe facts; medium cases save a known config to the live site and ask the agent to read it back (cleanup restores baseline); hard cases clear the config and require the agent to configure the throbber, verified against live config.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the Ajax Loader module, which config key selects the active animated throbber, and what are some of the built-in throbber plugin IDs I can set it to?
evals.expected_output: Set the 'throbber' key on ajax_loader.settings to a Throbber plugin ID. Built-ins include throbber_pulse, throbber_wave, throbber_circle, throbber_fading_circle, throbber_chasing_dots, throbber_double_bounce, throbber_three_bounce, throbber_rotating_plane, throbber_cube_grid, throbber_folding_cube, throbber_wandering_cubes and throbber_swing (12 total).

evals.prompt: For the Ajax Loader module, list the keys stored in the ajax_loader.settings config object and their default values, including which key controls where in the DOM the throbber is inserted.
evals.expected_output: ajax_loader.settings holds: throbber (plugin ID, default null), hide_ajax_message (bool, false), always_fullscreen (bool, false), show_admin_paths (bool, false), and throbber_position (CSS selector for the insertion point, default 'body').

evals.prompt: Where is the Ajax Loader settings form (admin path and route name) and which permission gates it?
evals.expected_output: The form is at /admin/config/user-interface/ajax-loader (route ajax_loader.settings, under Admin → Configuration → User interface), gated by the 'administer ajax loader' permission.

evals.prompt: On this live Drupal site, which Ajax Loader throbber is currently active and which CSS selector / DOM position is it configured to be inserted at? Inspect the running configuration.
evals.expected_output: The active throbber is throbber_folding_cube (Folding cube) and throbber_position is set to #main-content, per ajax_loader.settings (hide_ajax_message is also enabled).

evals.prompt: On this live Drupal site, is the Ajax Loader throbber configured to display as a full-screen overlay, and does it also show on admin pages? Which throbber is set? Check the current configuration.
evals.expected_output: Yes — always_fullscreen is TRUE (full-screen overlay) and show_admin_paths is TRUE (also shown on admin pages); the active throbber is throbber_wave, per ajax_loader.settings.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, configure the Ajax Loader module to use the Pulse throbber (plugin ID throbber_pulse), inserted at the default 'body' selector. Persist it to the ajax_loader.settings config and clear caches so it takes effect.
evals.expected_output: ajax_loader.settings has throbber=throbber_pulse and throbber_position=body (e.g. via `drush cset ajax_loader.settings throbber throbber_pulse -y` then `drush cr`).

evals.prompt: On this Drupal 11 site, configure Ajax Loader to use the Folding cube throbber (throbber_folding_cube) shown as a full-screen overlay (always_fullscreen) with the core AJAX loading message hidden (hide_ajax_message). Save it to ajax_loader.settings and clear caches.
evals.expected_output: ajax_loader.settings has throbber=throbber_folding_cube, always_fullscreen=true and hide_ajax_message=true, then caches cleared.
